data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for compatibility with memberships and one-time purchase access.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for compatibility with memberships and one-time purchase access. However, the evidence provided does not include any direct checks or confirmations related to this specific requirement. While the linked use case mentions the need for compatibility, there are no specific API reads or persisted state checks that confirm its implementation, leading to an inconclusive assessment.
gaps: No evidence confirming compatibility with memberships and one-time purchase access.
